sentences.arabic: شَعَرْتُ بِأَلَمٍ فِي أَسْنَانِي هَذَا الصَّبَاحَ.
sentences.translation: Osjetio sam bol u zubima jutros.
sentences.translationEn: I felt a pain in my teeth this morning.

sentences.arabic: حَجَزْتُ مَوْعِدًا عِنْدَ طَبِيبِ الْأَسْنَانِ لِلْفَحْصِ.
sentences.translation: Zakazao sam termin kod stomatologa za pregled.
sentences.translationEn: I booked an appointment with the dentist for an exam.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَنِي الطَّبِيبُ بِتَنْظِيفِ أَسْنَانِي مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar mi je savjetovao da čistim zube dva puta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor advised me to clean my teeth twice a day.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ، أَشْعُرُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ كَبِيرٍ بَعْدَ الْعِلَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Sada se osjećam mnogo bolje nakon tretmana.
sentences.translationEn: Now, I feel much better after the treatment.
